name: "Once, the Lone Wind That Kept the Dark Calamity at Bay..."
title: "Once, the Lone Wind That Kept the Dark Calamity at Bay..."
desc: "When a kingdom's glory has all but faded, warriors who still hold honor in their hearts often find themselves led, by different roads, to the same choice..."
in_play_description: At the start of the Action Phase: If your opponent has at least 7 cards in their Hand, their active character gains 1 stack of RES. If you have at least 7 cards in your Hand, your active character gains 2 stacks of RES.

attributes.source: Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge against Black Serpent Knight: Windcutter at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives in a Friendly Fracas

skills.desc:
Combat Action: When your active character is Black Serpent Knight: Windcutter, equip this card.
After Black Serpent Knight: Windcutter equips this card, immediately use Rising Slash once.
At the start of the Action Phase: If your opponent has at least 7 cards in their Hand, attach 1 stack of RES to their active character. If you have at least 7 cards in your Hand, attach 2 stacks of RES to your active character.
(You must have Black Serpent Knight: Windcutter in your deck to add this card to your deck)
